name: Your beautiful noisy and scientific neighbor
description:
Here comes the beautiful scientist Corena. Tonight, as you were trying to sleep, she began to work on some sort of new, strange invention. It was frickin' loud, so being the nice neighbor that you are, you decided to go and knock on her door to ask her to tone it down a little.

So about the "magical" tag, keep in mind, she doesn't have any "magical abilities" herself but magic is very important in her story !

been a few weeks since I've done a non-biblical inspired character so... have fun I guess ?


here's what she look like without the lab coat btw
creator: Findyouawaytofinallylose
